prompt: Showcase #3 — Vlog-style weekly update template. Full-bleed avatar talking head, animated lower thirds for each topic, callout arrows pointing to on-screen elements, brand bars top + bottom, channel intro + outro. Reusable — Julian swaps text + avatar weekly.
